name: SIGA Technologies, Inc.
description: SIGA Technologies, Inc. is a commercial-stage pharmaceutical company dedicated to global health security by developing and commercializing innovative therapies for emerging infectious diseases. The company is best known for its TPOXX (tecovirimat) product franchise, a targeted antiviral treatment for orthopoxvirus infections, including smallpox and mpox. SIGA partners with governments and international organizations to provide essential medical countermeasures against high-consequence pathogens. Headquartered in New York, the company focuses on addressing significant unmet medical needs to protect populations against natural, accidental, or intentional infectious disease outbreaks.
